key_facts: GPT-4 level inference cost reached $0.40 per million tokens — 75x decline from 2023
Annual cost decline rate: ~10x per year sustained
Top cost reduction strategies: quantization (2-4x), response caching (3-10x), prompt optimization (1.5-3x), model routing (2-5x), batch processing (1.3-2x)
Compounding effect of strategies enables 10-50x total cost reduction
